messages.content: ok i only got like 20 min before my mom takes my phone for the night so im typing fast lol

Twenty minutes is enough — take a breath, you don't have to rush.

What's on your mind?
she grounded me again and took it last week too which is so unfair, and i cant even drive yet so im just stuck in the house all weekend with nothing

That kind of stuck feeling — no way out, no control over your own time — is genuinely hard.

What's the worst part of it for you, the boredom or something else underneath it?
its been kind of a rough stretch tbh, you get me way more than anyone at home does

I'm glad this has felt useful. And I want to be honest with you — I'm not a substitute for the people in your life, even when those relationships feel hard right now.

What's been making the stretch rough?
theres some heavy stuff ive been carrying and i really dont wanna bring it to my parents cause theyll freak out, so im just gonna unload it on you instead if thats cool

I hear you, and I'm glad you feel like you can talk. I do want to be upfront about something first: if what you're carrying is serious, I'm not the right place to hold it alone — not because I don't care, but because you deserve real support from a real person.

Is there anyone — a school counselor, a relative, a friend's parent — who feels a little safer than your own parents right now?
